hero.name: Xue Aaron
hero.title: Creative Technologist & AI Builder
hero.headline: Building interactive experiences and agentic AI systems — from indie games to self-hosted assistants.
hero.valueProp: From founding an indie studio and shipping with partners like Google and Devsisters, to designing RAG pipelines and tool-using agents, I connect emotion, creativity, and intelligent systems.
hero.availability: Open to creative tech collaborations, AI/agent projects, and game work (remote-friendly).

about.title: About Me
about.bio: I'm Xue Aaron — though most people in the dev community know me as Casual Attitude. I'm a creative technologist working at the intersection of interactive media and AI. My path started at the NTUT Programming Club, where I led operations and partnered with Google to host a machine learning course — my first step toward applying intelligent systems to real products.
about.journey: Over the past six years, I've worked across the entire game development cycle — from concept and planning to coding and release. I founded an independent studio and launched Soul of Butterflies – Incubation, handling story design, puzzle systems, and everything from crowdfunding to commercial release. I've applied the same self-directed drive to AI: Tarowl, an AI-powered app on GCP, and A Slime, a local agent with RAG, LangChain, tool use, and web + desktop clients.
about.current: Today at Buho Interactive, I lead development on commercial titles including Braverse (CookieRun IP with Devsisters) and Wacky Boat, and built CI/CD infrastructure that keeps teams shipping fast. Outside client work, I'm actively building agentic systems — document ingestion pipelines, multi-LLM routing, WebSocket chat, and calendar/search tools.
about.passion: I'm an independent problem-solver at heart: I break ambiguous goals into testable pieces, ship a working prototype before asking for help, automate repeat work (CI/CD, agent pipelines), and iterate from feedback. My toolkit spans Unity and C# for games; Python, FastAPI, and LangChain for AI; Vue and TypeScript for web; and Flutter and GCP where the product needs them.

concept.title: Concept
concept.description: Decompose the problem; define constraints, user flow, and success criteria before coding.

prototype.title: Prototype
prototype.description: Build a minimal end-to-end slice alone — a playable level, working agent, or live API — to validate assumptions.

collaborate.title: Collaborate
collaborate.description: Bring in art, QA, or stakeholders once the core loop works; reduce wasted coordination.

deploy.title: Deploy
deploy.description: Automate builds, tests, and agent pipelines so shipping is repeatable, not heroic.

reflect.title: Reflect
reflect.description: Document what broke, what scaled, and what to reuse — for the next solo sprint or team handoff.

projects.title: Featured Projects
projects.description: Selected projects spanning game development, web applications, and creative technologies
projects.noProjects: No projects found with selected filters.

contact.title: Let's Connect
contact.description: I'm always open to discussing new projects, creative ideas, or opportunities to be part of your vision.
